title: UK sets final crypto rules as firms face 2027 FCA authorization deadline
summary: The UK’s financial regulator has published its crypto regulatory framework, setting the authorization deadline for cryptocurrency firms for February 2027.

title: Bitcoin faces critical test as bulls aim to hold $60K: Did BTC bottom?
summary: Bitcoin’s loose hold on $60,000 and soft futures markets raise questions about whether BTC has bottomed.

title: China Misses AI Boom as Stocks Trail Most Since 2001
summary: After a banner year for Chinese stocks on the back of AI advances, 2026 is not going well.

title: Yen Hits Four-Decade Low in Historic Slide That’s Rattled Japan
summary: The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market.

title: Strategy (MSTR) Surges Over 12% As Bitcoin-Linked Stocks Have Green Day
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy (MSTR) Surges Over 12% As Bitcoin-Linked Stocks Have Green Day
Strategy (MSTR) shares surged 14% at times on Monday after the company unveiled a sweeping capital overhaul, leading a broad rally in bitcoin-linked stocks despite Bitcoin remaining under pressure near $60,000.

title: Ornith Is the Open-Source Coding Model Built for Agents, Not Humans
summary: A new model built by DeepReinforce is meant for developers who want AI that finishes the job, not just autocompletes the next line.

title: Strategy Snaps 9-Day Losing Streak as Bitcoin Giant Adopts 'Robust' Capital Framework
summary: Strategy's shares remained 42% down from its market-rattling Bitcoin sale nearly a month ago.

title: UK sets capital, market abuse rules in landmark crypto framework
summary: The FCA finalized UK crypto rules covering capital, stablecoins and market abuse ahead of Oct. 2027 implementation.

title: TD Cowen says crypto market structure bill passage ‘far from assured’ before midterm election
summary: The passage of the crypto market structure bill, or Clarity Act, before the November midterm election is "far from assured," said TD Cowen.
